---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a problem with a skill
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Skill

Which skill is affected? (e.g., ds-compliance, ds-mobile)

## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `/skill-name` with ...
2. Select mode ...
3. See error ...

## Expected Behavior

What should have happened instead.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or incorrect findings.

## Environment

- AI Tool: (e.g., Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot)
- OS: (e.g., macOS 15, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24)
- Project type: (e.g., Flutter app, Node.js API)
